contract.boundary: Marvin enforces strict indexed-context mode for local evidence and keeps the working set subatomic: small enough for the requested token budget. Subatomic is a Qorx context-size label, not a physics claim. Downstream model correctness, external tool behavior, and facts absent from the local index are outside this local planner contract.

steps.reason: emit tiny local session pointer without bulk context
ground objective against indexed quarks only
return the smallest relevant working set under budget
